samples.xml_description:
Implement a 32-bit carry-lookahead adder using the Carry-Lookahead Adder (CLA) architecture. 32-bit input operand A. 32-bit input operand B. 32-bit output representing the sum of A and B. Carry-out output. 32

Implement the 32-bit carry-lookahead adder using the CLA architecture.

For the CLA architecture, the carry-out of each 1-bit full adder is propagated to the next stage.

Design the adder using a generate block to instantiate 16-bit CLA blocks.
